creator: ifreund@freebsdfoundation.org
text:
I just opened a pull request implementing my proposal: https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/pull/2330

I managed to simplify the logic defining edges compared to what's written in the proposal above by basing it on the old/new packages installed/deleted by a job rather than the job type.

This patch could use real-world testing if anyone would like to give it a spin!
